289.issue_title: Epic: Installable Wheel / Standalone MCP Server (phase-gate-mcp)

406.issue_title: feature: Russian Doll Decorator Pipeline for exception mapping

cycles.name: Cycle 1: Interfaces & Type Foundation

deliverables.description: Introduce new ITool/ICoreTool interfaces under mcp_server/core/interfaces/
Rename old ITool to ILegacyTool in tools/base.py and update ToolErrorOutput signatures

cycles.exit_criteria: ITool/ICoreTool exist and imports are updated to ILegacyTool

cycles.name: Cycle 2: Decorator Pipeline

deliverables.description: Implement ToolErrorHandlerDecorator, InputValidationDecorator, and EnforcementDecorator under mcp_server/core/decorators/

cycles.exit_criteria: Decorators handle validation, enforcement, and error mapping

deliverables.description: Segregate cache interfaces to publisher/reader and implement ResponseCacheManager updates

cycles.name: Cycle 4: Presenter Engine & Fallback Unit Tests

deliverables.description: Implement IPresenter interface and TextPresenter fallback

cycles.name: Cycle 5: ToolFactory & Bootstrap Prep
cycles.exit_criteria: ToolFactory implemented and Ruff T20 print check enabled

cycles.name: Cycle 6: Tool-laag Migratie

deliverables.description: Migrate all tool endpoints to ICoreTool and retire base.py

cycles.exit_criteria: Migrate all tool endpoints to ICoreTool

cycles.name: Cycle 7: Transport Orchestratie & E2E

deliverables.description: Refactor server.py handle_call_tool and add E2E test

cycles.exit_criteria: Refactor server.py and add E2E test

cycles.name: Cycle 8: Interface Packaging Refactor (Facade init)

deliverables.description: Concrete interface and type definitions extracted from __init__.py
TypeVar declarations in icore_tool.py corrected to invariant

cycles.exit_criteria: All concrete class and protocol definitions are extracted from interfaces/__init__.py and it contains only facade imports. TypeVar variance and IPresenter runtime checkable are corrected.

cycles.name: Cycle 9: Decoupled Visual Presentation & Config Fallbacks

deliverables.description: TextPresenter and IPresenter signatures accept CachePublication

cycles.exit_criteria: Visual presentation formatted in TextPresenter and fallback warnings fetched from presentation.yaml using CachePublication.

cycles.name: Cycle 10: Validation Schema Integration & Orchestration Clean-up

deliverables.description: MCPServer constructor stripped of unused dependencies
MCPServer extracts validation schema dynamically from ValidationErrorOutput DTO

cycles.exit_criteria: MCPServer orchestrator handles sequential linear execution flow and returns ValidationErrorOutput schema dynamically. Unused manager dependencies are removed and test_server.py mock coupling is refactored.
